description: Database schema setup — all core tables (workspaces, teams, issues, projects, cycles, initiatives, labels, views, comments, reactions, notifications) with Drizzle ORM migrations pushed to Postgres
Redis connection setup for real-time sync, caching, and pub/sub. ElastiCache client configuration with ioredis
S3 storage setup for file attachments and avatars. Upload/download utilities with presigned URLs
SES email setup for magic link auth emails and notifications. Email sending utility with templates
Google OAuth login via Better Auth. 'Continue with Google' button on login page, OAuth redirect flow, account creation on first login, session creation
Email magic link login via Better Auth + SES. 'Continue with Email' flow: enter email → receive magic link with 6-digit code → click link or enter code → session created
Session management and protected routes. Next.js middleware checking Better Auth sessions. Redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Sessions stored in Postgres via Drizzle adapter
Login/signup page UI. Clean minimal page with 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with Email' buttons. Linear-style branding. Dark theme. Handles both login and signup
Workspace creation flow. After first login, user creates a workspace: enter name + URL slug. Auto-creates a default team with the workspace name. Redirects to main dashboard
Invite team members step (skippable). After workspace creation, prompt to invite teammates by email. Enter multiple emails, select role. Skip button available

Empty states for all core features. Issues list: 'No issues' with create CTA. Projects: empty with create CTA. Cycles: 'No active cycle'. Inbox: 'You're all caught up'. My Issues: 'No issues assigned'
